[[Foreman/Legends|Foreman]] '''Chivos''' was employed by [[Mensix Corp]] to oversee the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

One of his several responsibilities was to ensure the [[Mining/Legends|mining]] crews received their appropriate supplies. On one occasion where supply [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were failing to deliver their shipments, Chivos resorted to employing random [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] to do the job.

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Chivos was a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by Sony Online Entertainment and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on December 15, 2011.

*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
